---
title: "New! Lecture announcement Spring 2020/21 " 
description: "MAD434: SOCIAL LICENCE TO OPERATE IN MINING"
date: 2021-02-10T15:13:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [MAD434]
comments: false
---

Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` Starting from Spring 2020/21, there will be new technical elective in our curriculum for 8^th^ Semester called **"SOCIAL LICENCE TO OPERATE IN MINING"** the course code is **MAD434**.

In this blog, you will find further information on this course.


`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC
